Questions: Can you list all instruments that were calibrated last month
Query:
SELECT im.instrument_code,
cmd.calibration_id,
cmd.calibration_date,
cmd.calibration_facility_code,cmd.calibration_category, cmd.calibration_status
FROM ai.instrument_master im
JOin ai.calibrationmasterdetails cmd
ON im.instrument_code = cmd.calibration_instrument_code
WHERE cmd.calibration_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
AND cmd.calibration_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
AND cmd.calibration_facility_code in ('SRP-WPB-PKG')
ORDER BY cmd.calibration_date;

SELECT c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_calibration_id AS calibration_id, c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_master_actual AS master_actual_value, c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_test_actual AS test_actual_value, c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_master_actual_minus_test_actu AS difference, c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_error AS error FROM ai.calibration_flow_meter_difference c LEFT JOin ai.calibrationmasterdetails d ON c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_calibration_id = d.calibration_id WHERE TRIM(c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_error::TEXT) <> '' AND c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_error::TEXT ~ '^[0-9]*\.?[0-9]+$' AND CAST(c.calibration_flow_meter_difference_error AS NUMERIC) > 2.00
AND d.calibration_facility_code in ('MYS-PB-REAC AND PE', 'MYS-MATERIALS', 'MYS-PB-GENERAL', 'MYS-WPB-PRS');
Result & Answer Format:
High Flow Meter Error Observations:
Calibration ID: CO000071
Master instrument Actual Value: 200.0000
Test instrument Actual Value: 194.0000
Difference: 6.0000
Error: 3.00%
Question with Facility Code:
#User Facility#
['MYS-PB-REAC AND PE', 'MYS-MATERIALS','MYS-PB-GENERAL','MYS-WPB-PRS']

User Query: Find calibration orders where the flow meter error is above a threshold of 2%

Questions: Identify instruments where calibration validity has expired
Query:
SELECT 
    c.calibration_id, 
    c.calibration_instrument_code, 
    i.instrument_master_information_validity
FROM 
    ai.calibrationmasterdetails c
LEFT JOIN LATERAL 
    unnest(c.calibration_master_instrument_information_id) AS inst_id 
    ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN 
    ai.instrument_master_information i 
    ON inst_id = i.instrument_master_information_id
WHERE 
    i.instrument_master_information_validity < CURRENT_DATE
    AND c.calibration_facility_code IN (
        'MYS-PB-REAC AND PE',
        'MYS-MATERIALS',
        'MYS-PB-GENERAL',
        'MYS-WPB-PRS'
    );
Result & Answer Format:
Expired instruments:
Calorder ID: CO000005
Instrument Code: PG005
Question with Facility Code:
#User Facility#
['MYS-PB-REAC AND PE', 'MYS-MATERIALS','MYS-PB-GENERAL','MYS-WPB-PRS']

User Query: Identify instruments where calibration validity has expired

Questions: What is the total number of spare parts available from each store
Query:
SELECT 
    ai.spareparts_store_wise_stock.spareparts_store_wise_stock_store_code,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM 
    ai.spareparts_master
JOIN 
    ai.spareparts_store_wise_stock
    ON ai.spareparts_master.spareparts_part_code = ai.spareparts_store_wise_stock.spareparts_store_wise_stock_part_code
JOIN 
    ai.facilitylinkstore
    ON ai.spareparts_store_wise_stock.spareparts_store_wise_stock_store_code = ai.facilitylinkstore.facilitylink_storecode
WHERE 
    ai.spareparts_store_wise_stock.spareparts_store_wise_stock_store_code IN ('1106-ENG4')
    AND ai.facilitylinkstore.facilitylink_facility_code IN ('SRP-WPB')
GROUP BY 
    ai.spareparts_store_wise_stock.spareparts_store_wise_stock_store_code;
Result & Answer Format:
Store: 1106-ENG2, Total Spare Parts: 4000
Store: 1106-ENG4, Total Spare Parts: 300
Question with Facility Code:
#User Facility#
['SRP-WPB']

Questions: How does the workorder_equipment_code in CHINP-WO0395658 align with the workorder_category and workorder_type, and does it indicate any recurring equipment issues for that specific type?
Query:
WITH target_wo AS (
    SELECT 
        workorder_equipment_code,
        workorder_category,
        workorder_type
    FROM ai.workordermasterdetails
    WHERE workorder_id = 'CHINP-WO0395658' and workorder_facility_code in ('1011- CBU-STC-001','1011-UTIL-WTP-FRO','1011-UTIL-STM-OTH')
),
related_wos AS (
    SELECT 
        w.workorder_id,
        w.workorder_equipment_name,
        w.workorder_equipment_code,
        w.workorder_category,
        w.workorder_type,
        w.workorder_status,
        w.workorder_createdtime
    FROM ai.workordermasterdetails w
    JOIN target_wo t
      ON w.workorder_equipment_code = t.workorder_equipment_code
     AND w.workorder_category = t.workorder_category
     AND w.workorder_type = t.workorder_type
)
SELECT * 
FROM related_wos
ORDER BY workorder_createdtime DESC;

Questions: What is the Status of parts for work order CHINP-WO0389244?
Query:
SELECT
    wsp.workorder_spareparts_reservationid AS reservation_id,
    wsp.workorder_spareparts_partname AS part_name,
    CASE 
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_deletionstatus = true THEN 'Deleted Status'
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_rejectionstatus = false THEN 'Rejected Status'
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_completedstatus = true THEN 'Part Issued from Store'
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_activestatus = true THEN 'Latest Active Reservation'
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_reservationstatus = 'S' THEN 'Reservation Created'
        ELSE 'No Reservation'
    END AS part_status
FROM 
    ai.workorder_spareparts wsp
JOIN 
    ai.workordermasterdetails womd 
    ON wsp.workorder_spareparts_workorder_id = womd.workorder_id
WHERE 
    womd.workorder_id = 'CHINP-WO0389244' and workorder_facility_code in ('1011- CBU-STC-001');

Questions: List the Work Orders that are in deleted status along with their replacement reasons.
Query:
select
        workorder_spareparts_workorder_id as workorder_id,
    wsp.workorder_spareparts_reservationid AS reservation_id,
    wsp.workorder_spareparts_partname AS part_name,
    wsp.workorder_spareparts_ReplacementReason,
    CASE 
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_deletionstatus = true THEN 'Deleted Status'
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_rejectionstatus = false THEN 'Rejected Status'
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_completedstatus = true THEN 'Part Issued from Store'
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_activestatus = true THEN 'Latest Active Reservation'
        WHEN wsp.workorder_spareparts_reservationstatus = 'S' THEN 'Reservation Created'
        ELSE 'No Reservation'
    END AS part_status
FROM 
    ai.workorder_spareparts wsp
JOIN 
    ai.workordermasterdetails womd 
    ON wsp.workorder_spareparts_workorder_id = womd.workorder_id
WHERE 
    workorder_facility_code in ('1011- CBU-STC-001') and workorder_spareparts_ReplacementReason != '' and wsp.workorder_spareparts_deletionstatus = true;

Questions: How many work order is not mapped with or without any vendor?
Query:
SELECT
    wmd.workorder_facility_code,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN wv.workorder_vendor_name IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS mapped_with_vendor,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN wv.workorder_vendor_name IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS without_vendor
FROM ai.workordermasterdetails wmd
LEFT JOIN ai.workorder_vendor wv
    ON wmd.workorder_id = wv.workorder_vendor_workorder_id 
WHERE wmd.workorder_facility_code IN ('1011-UTIL-VEN-EXF', '1011- PCR-TBM-003')
GROUP BY wmd.workorder_facility_code;

Questions: How many vendors involved in work orders had their contracts expired before the work order completion?

SELECT 
    workorder_vendor_name, COUNT(workorder_vendor_name) AS expired_vendor_count
FROM 
    ai.workorder_vendor 
LEFT JOIN 
    ai.workordermasterdetails 
    ON workorder_vendor_workorder_id = workorder_id 
WHERE 
    workorder_facility_code IN ('1011-UTIL-VEN-EXF', '1011- PCR-TBM-003')
    AND workorder_vendor_expiry_date IS NOT NULL
    AND workorder_vendor_expiry_date != ''
    AND workorder_completeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND workorder_vendor_expiry_date::date < workorder_completeddate::date
group by  workorder_vendor_name;

Questions: What is the lost hours for WO000112 Work Order?
Query:
SELECT workorder_id,
CASE WHEN (workorder_equipment_ontime IS NULL OR workorder_equipment_ontime::TEXT = '') AND (workorder_equipment_offtime IS NULL OR workorder_equipment_offtime::TEXT = '') THEN 'No lost hours' WHEN workorder_equipment_ontime IS NULL OR workorder_equipment_ontime::TEXT = '' THEN 'Machine not switched on' WHEN workorder_equipment_losthours_text IS NOT NULL THEN workorder_equipment_losthours_text::TEXT ELSE ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (workorder_equipment_ontime - workorder_equipment_offtime)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2)::TEXT
END AS equipment_lost_hours_or_note
FROM (
SELECT workorder_id,
workorder_equipment_offtime,
workorder_equipment_ontime,
NULLIF(workorder_equipment_losthours::TEXT, '') AS workorder_equipment_losthours_text
FROM ai.workordermasterdetails
WHERE workorder_id IN ('WO000112')
AND workorder_facility_code in ('ATC-GJ')
) AS sub;

Questions: Retrieve the most and least expensive spare parts.
Query:
SELECT *
FROM (
SELECT ws.spareparts_part_name,
ws.spareparts_part_code,
s.spareparts_store_wise_stock_available_quantity,
s.spareparts_store_wise_stock_last_price,
s.spareparts_store_wise_stock_store_code,
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY s.spareparts_store_wise_stock_last_price DESC) AS price_rank_desc,
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY s.spareparts_store_wise_stock_last_price ASC) AS price_rank_asc
FROM ai.spareparts_store_wise_stock s
JOIN ai.spareparts_master ws ON s.spareparts_store_wise_stock_part_code = ws.spareparts_part_code
WHERE s.spareparts_store_wise_stock_store_code in ('ATC-GJ') and
s.spareparts_store_wise_stock_last_price <> 0
) ranked_parts
where price_rank_asc = 1 or price_rank_desc = 1;
Result & Answer Format:
spareparts_part_name spareparts_part_code spareparts_store_wise_stock_available_quantity spareparts_store_wise_stock_last_price spareparts_store_wise_stock_store_code price_rank_desc price_rank_asc

Questions: What percentage of work orders do not require a safety permit?
Query:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT workorder_safety_permit_workorder_id) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE 
            ((COUNT(DISTINCT wmd.workorder_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT wsp.workorder_safety_permit_workorder_id)) * 100.0 
            / COUNT(DISTINCT wmd.workorder_id))
    END AS percentage_without_permits
FROM ai.workordermasterdetails wmd
LEFT JOIN ai.workorder_safety_permit wsp 
    ON wmd.workorder_id = wsp.workorder_safety_permit_workorder_id 
WHERE wmd.workorder_facility_code IN ('SRP-DC');

    wpa.workorder_rca_preventive_action_activity_description AS preventive_action,
    wpa.workorder_rca_preventive_action_targetdate AS preventive_target_date,
    wca.workorder_rca_corrective_action_activity_description AS corrective_action
FROM 
    ai.workordermasterdetails wom
JOIN 
    ai.workorder_rca_preventive_action wpa 
    ON wom.workorder_id = wpa.workorder_rca_preventive_action_reference_workorder_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    ai.workorder_rca_corrective_action wca 
    ON wom.workorder_id = wca.workorder_rca_corrective_action_reference_workorder_id 
WHERE 
    wpa.workorder_rca_preventive_action_targetdate < CURRENT_DATE
    OR wca.workorder_rca_corrective_action_activity_description IS NULL AND workorder_facility_code IN ('1004-DIVA-EXT-DUE');

Questions: What is the Last month PM complaince %?
Query:
SELECT ROUND(
    (
        COUNT(CASE 
            WHEN LOWER(workorder_status) IN ('completed', 'closed')
            THEN 1 
        END) * 100.0
    ) / NULLIF(
        COUNT(CASE 
            WHEN 1=1 -- counts all records in the filtered set
            THEN 1 
        END)
        - COUNT(CASE 
            WHEN LOWER(workorder_status) = 'cancelled'
            THEN 1 
        END),
    0), 
2) AS preventive_compliance_percentage
FROM ai.workordermasterdetails
WHERE 
    workorder_facility_code IN ('1007-TBCU-CUR-TR5')
    AND workorder_is_createdfrom = 'sm'
    AND workorder_type = 'Preventive'
    AND workorder_createdtime >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month'
    AND workorder_createdtime < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);
Result & Answer Format: Last month PM complaince % is 77.22%
